properties.property: {"id":27,"name":"Triple Triad duel with prize","x":16,"y":8,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"trainer_COOLTRAINER_F","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":4,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rIf you win, I\u0027ll give you an Arceus card!"]},{"c":111,"i":0,"p":[12,"pbCanTriadDuel?"]},{"c":108,"i":1,"p":["This duel has a prize card defined, which the player "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["gets if they win (ignoring any rule which affects "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["prizes). If the player draws or loses, however, the "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["rules apply normally."]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["pbTriadDuel(\u0022Sophie\u0022, 0, 5, nil, nil,"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[" :ARCEUS"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[")"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\rOh, you don\u0027t have enough cards to play. You need "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["at least 5."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

{"id":16,"name":"Voltorb Flip","x":11,"y":10,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":209,"i":0,"p":[18,{"_class":"RPG::MoveRoute","@list":[{"_class":"RPG::MoveCommand","@parameters":[],"@code":16},{"_class":"RPG::MoveCommand","@parameters":[],"@code":0}],"@skippable":false,"@repeat":false}]},{"c":509,"i":0,"p":[{"_class":"RPG::MoveCommand","@parameters":[],"@code":16}]},{"c":210,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bMr. Game: Show me how you play and make my "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["heart pound with excitement!"]},{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["pbVoltorbFlip"]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

{"id":22,"name":"Triple Triad explainer","x":13,"y":2,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"NPC 08","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rI\u0027m here to explain the rules of Triple Triad."]},{"c":118,"i":0,"p":["Choices"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rWhich topic do you want to learn about?"]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Basics","Game rules","Prizes","Exit"],4]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Basics"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\rTriple Triad is a game played with special cards "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["placed on a 3x3 board."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\rEach card has 4 numbers on it, one per side. "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["These numbers are so-called stats."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\rPlayers take turns placing cards on the board. As "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["they do so, they try to capture and gain control of "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["their opponent\u0027s cards."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\rThat\u0027s where the numbers come in. If a player "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["places a card with a higher number next to a card "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["with a lower number, the player captures that card."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\rThus, the goal of the game is to gain control of more "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["cards than the other player by the end of the game."]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Choices"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"Game rules"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\rThere are a number of optional game rules you can "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["apply to individual games."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\rThey can affect card stats, how cards capture "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["each other, the scoring and the prizes."]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Choices"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[2,"Prizes"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\rWhen you win a game, you will recive 1 random "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["card from your opponent from their Deck."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\rThis also works the other way around: if you lose, "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["you have to give your opponent one of your cards, "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["chosen at random."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\rYou can change what you win or lose from a game "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["by using an optional game rule."]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Choices"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[3,"Exit"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

{"id":17,"name":"Lottery","x":9,"y":2,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"NPC 23","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rThis is the Pok\u00E9mon Lottery Corner. I\u0027m Felicity, your "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["attendant today."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rIf the drawn number matches the ID No. of any of "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["your Pok\u00E9mon, you could win fabulous gifts."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rWould you like to check today\u0027s lucky number?"]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Yes","No"],2]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Yes"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\rFirst, I\u0027ll look up today\u0027s Pok\u00E9mon Lottery Corner "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["lucky number."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["..."]},{"c":108,"i":1,"p":["This line of code calculates a winning ID number "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["depending on the date, and puts it in Game Variable "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["1."]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["pbSetLotteryNumber(1)"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\rYour Loto Ticket number is \\v[1]."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\rNow, let\u0027s see if it matches the ID No. of any of your "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["Pok\u00E9mon."]},{"c":108,"i":1,"p":["This line of code checks all Pok\u00E9mon in the player\u0027s "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["party and storage for one that best matches the "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["given ID number. The Pok\u00E9mon\u0027s name is put in Game "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["Variable 2, its location (1=party, 2=storage) is put in "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["Game Variable 3, and the number of digits matched is "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["put in Game Variable 4."]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["pbLottery(pbGet(1), 2, 3, 4)"]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[1,4,0,0,0]},{"c":108,"i":2,"p":["No digits were matched."]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\rI\u0027m sorry. You didn\u0027t get a match..."]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\rPlease do visit again."]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":355,"i":2,"p":["$stats.lottery_prize_count \u002B= 1"]},{"c":108,"i":2,"p":["1 or more digits were matched."]},{"c":108,"i":2,"p":["Show a message depending on whether the matching "]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["Pok\u00E9mon is in the player\u0027s party or Pok\u00E9mon storage."]},{"c":111,"i":2,"p":[1,3,0,1,0]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["\\rCongratulations!"]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["\\rThe ID number of your team\u0027s \\v[2] matches your "]},{"c":401,"i":3,"p":["Loto Ticket number!"]},{"c":0,"i":3,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["\\rCongratulations!"]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["\\rThe ID number of your PC-boxed \\v[2] matches your "]},{"c":401,"i":3,"p":["Loto Ticket number!"]},{"c":0,"i":3,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":108,"i":2,"p":["Award a prize based on how many digits were "]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["matched."]},{"c":111,"i":2,"p":[1,4,0,5,0]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["\\rOh my goodness, all five digits matched!"]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["\\rYou\u0027ve won the jackpot prize!"]},{"c":111,"i":3,"p":[12,"pbReceiveItem(:MASTERBALL)"]},{"c":101,"i":4,"p":["\\rPlease do visit again! Good-bye from Felicity, your "]},{"c":401,"i":4,"p":["attendant!"]},{"c":355,"i":4,"p":["pbSetEventTime"]},{"c":0,"i":4,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":3,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":4,"p":["\\rYou have no room left. It\u0027s "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["just an example of how the player could gain Triple "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["Triad cards. You could implement other ways."]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Shop Start"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[3,"Exit"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bPlease come again."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

{"id":24,"name":"Triple Triad duel","x":16,"y":5,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"trainer_YOUNGSTER","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":4,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bI\u0027m ready to duel with you."]},{"c":111,"i":0,"p":[12,"pbCanTriadDuel?"]},{"c":108,"i":1,"p":["The two numbers are the min and max level of the "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["opponent respectively. Each number can be between "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["0 and 9 inclusive, and the max level must be higher "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["than or equal to the min level."]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["pbTriadDuel(\u0022Jack\u0022, 0, 5)"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bOh, you don\u0027t have enough cards to play. You need "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["at least 5."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

{"id":30,"name":"Prize vendor right","x":6,"y":23,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"NPC 07","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\CN\\bWe exchange your coins for prizes."]},{"c":118,"i":0,"p":["Choice"]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["The \u0022Show Choices\u0022 command doesn\u0027t let you type in "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["long choice names, so a choice name as long as"]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["\u0022TM24 Thunderbolt - 4000 coins\u0022"]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["won\u0027t fit."]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["You could use rename_choice here to replace the "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["choice names. rename_choice doesn\u0027t have a limit on "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["the length of the choice name it sets."]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["However, doing so here to include the moves\u0027 names "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["in the choices will usually make the choice window too "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["wide, and it will overlap the coins window."]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["This event settles for showing the move\u0027s name in the "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["message below, upon choosing an item."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\CN\\bWhich prize would you like?"]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["TM13 - 4000 coins","TM23 - 3500 coins","TM24 - 4000 coins","TM30 - 4500 coins"],0]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"TM13 - 4000 coins"]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["pbSet(1, :TM13)"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["pbSet(2, 4000)"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"TM23 - 4000 coins"]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["pbSet(1, :TM35)"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["pbSet(2, 4000)"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"No thanks"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\CN\\bPlease save your Coins and come again!"]},{"c":115,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["================================"]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["Chose an item, try to buy it."]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["================================"]},{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["itm = GameData::Item.get(pbGet(1))"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":["move = itm.move"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":["mov = GameData::Move.get(move)"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":["pbSet(3, itm.name \u002B \u0022 \u0022 \u002B mov.name)"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\CN\\bSo, you want the \\v[3]?"]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Yes","No"],2]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Yes"]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[12,"pbGet(2) \u003E $player.coins"]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\CN\\bSorry, you\u0027ll need more coins than that."]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":111,"i":2,"p":[12,"$bag.can_add?(pbGet(1))"]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["\\CN\\bHere you go!\\1"]},{"c":250,"i":3,"p":[{"_class":"RPG::AudioFile","@volume":100,"@name":"Mart buy item","@pitch":100}]},{"c":355,"i":3,"p":["$player.coins -= pbGet(2)"]},{"c":355,"i":3,"p":["pbBuyPrize(pbGet(1))"]},{"c":0,"i":3,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["\\CN\\bYou have no room in your Bag."]},{"c":0,"i":3,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"No"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":119,"i":0,"p":["Choice"]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}
